query:
INSERT INTO banned_phrases (phrase, category, description, suggestion, active) VALUES
('guaranteed income', 'critical', 'Income guarantees violate Meta policy', 'Try ''potential to earn'' or ''opportunity to generate''', true),
('make $', 'critical', 'Specific income claims not allowed', 'Focus on the value or transformation instead', true),
('earn $', 'critical', 'Specific income claims not allowed', 'Use ''increase your revenue'' or ''grow your business''', true),
('₹', 'critical', 'Currency symbols with amounts violate policy', 'Remove specific amounts, focus on outcomes', true),
('guaranteed results', 'critical', 'Outcome guarantees are prohibited', 'Use ''designed to help you'' or ''proven framework''', true),
('cure', 'critical', 'Health claims require FDA approval', 'Use ''support'' or ''help manage'' instead', true),
('miracle', 'critical', 'Sensational health claims prohibited', 'Use ''effective'' or ''powerful'' with context', true),
('FDA approved', 'critical', 'False medical claims', 'Only use if genuinely FDA approved with proof', true),
('lose weight fast', 'critical', 'Unrealistic health promises', 'Use ''sustainable weight management'' or ''healthy lifestyle''', true),
('get rich quick', 'critical', 'Unrealistic financial promises', 'Focus on skill-building and strategy', true),
('financial freedom overnight', 'critical', 'Unrealistic timeline claims', 'Use ''path to financial independence'' with realistic timeframes', true),
('no effort required', 'critical', 'Misleading ease-of-use claims', 'Be honest about effort: ''simple framework'' or ''step-by-step system''', true),
('best', 'warning', 'Superlative without proof', 'Use ''highly effective'' or ''top-rated by users''', true),
('revolutionary', 'warning', 'Exaggerated claims', 'Use ''innovative'' or ''proven approach''', true),
('click now', 'warning', 'Aggressive CTA', 'Use ''learn more'' or ''get started today''', true),
('limited time', 'warning', 'False urgency if not true', 'Only use if genuinely time-limited with specific dates', true),
('before and after', 'warning', 'Requires disclaimers', 'Use testimonials with ''results may vary'' disclaimer', true);

INSERT INTO compliance_versions (version, lastUpdated, nextReviewDue, notes) VALUES
('v1.0', '2026-02-21', '2026-05-21', 'Initial compliance rules based on Meta Advertising Policies (February 2026)');
